package rulecoverage

func PositiveRepositoryReturnsTransportDto() string {
    ruleID := "repository_returns_transport_dto"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Repositories that know about response contracts instead of returning persistence or domain results."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
